query:
Here is an establishment or group in the CHR sector (Cafés, Hotels, or Restaurants): BOSIRE and its website https://www.bosire.com.
Optionnaly here is the address TOURCOING, FR and country code FR

I need to understand its current affiliation and group size.

1.  Determine whether this establishment is independent or part of a larger group
2.  If it is part of a group, determine the total number of locations owned by this group.

CRITICAL DEFINITIONS & CONSTRAINTS:

- Establishment Scope: Consider all food service businesses (restaurants, cafes, hotels, bakery, bars) the CHR sector.
- Input Flexibility: The name and domain provided may refer to a single location or the larger parent group. 
In all cases, these are the starting points for your search.
- Total Locations Calculation (Group definition): The term owns must be interpreted in the broadest sense. The total number of locations must be the sum of all sites directly owned/operate PLUS all sites operated via franchise agreements (Total = Owned + Franchised).
- Use the group's webpage centralizing all their locations, often called "our locations," "nos restaurants," or "store locator." to check the number of locations they display there.
- Final Result Selection: The final number of locations reported must be the highest total number found across all sources (webpage, store locator, reports, etc.). If only one location is found, the result is 1.
answer:
### Executive Summary

Bôsire Gastronomie (legally registered as SAS BOSIRE) operates as an independent establishment in the CHR sector, functioning primarily as a caterer and event venue in Tourcoing, France [Société BOSIRE à TOURCOING (59200) - 379436082](https://www.societe.com/societe/bosire-379436082.html). Research indicates the company is not part of a larger corporate group or franchise network, resulting in a total group size of **1 location** [Bôsire Gastronomie - Traiteurs.fr](https://www.traiteurs.fr/entreprises/bosire-gastronomie). Notably, the entity recently became subject to a legal collective procedure judgment on March 21, 2025 [Société BOSIRE à TOURCOING (59200). Chiffre d'affaires, bénéfice, statuts, extrait RNE, bilans, actionnaires - 379436082](https://www.societe.com/societe/bosire-379436082.html).

### Corporate Identity and Affiliation

The legal entity behind Bôsire Gastronomie is SAS BOSIRE, registered under SIREN number 379 436 082 and SIRET 379 436 082 000 18 [Société BOSIRE à TOURCOING (59200) - 379436082](https://www.societe.com/societe/bosire-379436082.html); [Bosire Gastronomie | Mentions légales](https://www.bosire.com/mentions-legales/). 

The company operates independently. Open data sources identify SAS BOSIRE as a standalone French entity by default, with no identified parent corporate group or holding company [Société BOSIRE à TOURCOING (59200) - 379436082](https://www.societe.com/societe/bosire-379436082.html). Corporate records associate the Knockaert family with the establishment's leadership, specifically noting Christine Knockaert on the company website and Celine Knockaert in corporate mandates [Bosire Gastronomie | Mentions légales](https://www.bosire.com/mentions-legales/); [Pappers : Toute l'information gratuite sur les entreprises en France](https://www.pappers.fr/dirigeant/celine_knockaert_2001-03).

### Operations and Location Footprint

Based on the company's official website (www.bosire.com) and regional directories, SAS BOSIRE operates exactly **1 location** [Bôsire Gastronomie - Traiteurs.fr](https://www.traiteurs.fr/entreprises/bosire-gastronomie). There is no mention of a franchise network or additional branches [Bôsire Gastronomie - Traiteurs.fr](https://www.traiteurs.fr/entreprises/bosire-gastronomie). 

The sole establishment is located at 283 Rue du Brun Pain, 59200 Tourcoing, France [Bosire Gastronomie | Mentions légales](https://www.bosire.com/mentions-legales/). Operating in the CHR sub-sector as a caterer (traiteur) and restaurateur, the site provides:
*   On-site reception halls for private and professional events, including seminars and cocktails [Bôsire Gastronomie : Traiteur Tourcoing 59200 (adresse, horaire et avis)](https://www.justacote.com/tourcoing-59200/traiteur/bosire-gastronomie-652871.htm); [Bôsire Gastronomie : Salle de séminaire Lille (59)](https://www.aleou.fr/salle-seminaire/22535-bosire-gastronomie.html).
*   Off-site catering services (service traiteur extérieur) offering buffets, cocktails, and meal boxes [Bosire Gastronomie | Service en extérieur](https://www.bosire.com/service-traiteur-exterieur/).
*   Trading of food products and related equipment rental [Société BOSIRE à TOURCOING (59200) - 379436082](https://www.societe.com/societe/bosire-379436082.html).

### Risk Assessment: Recent Legal Developments

A significant legal event recently impacted the company's operational status. On March 21, 2025, a legal judgment was issued regarding SAS BOSIRE by the Greffe du Tribunal de Commerce de Lille-Métropole [Société BOSIRE à TOURCOING (59200). Chiffre d'affaires, bénéfice, statuts, extrait RNE, bilans, actionnaires - 379436082](https://www.societe.com/societe/bosire-379436082.html). 

This judgment is categorized as a collective procedure (procédure collective), a legal framework that typically encompasses insolvency proceedings such as liquidation or redressement [Société BOSIRE à TOURCOING (59200). Chiffre d'affaires, bénéfice, statuts, extrait RNE, bilans, actionnaires - 379436082](https://www.societe.com/societe/bosire-379436082.html); [Liquidation judiciaire d'une société | Service Public Entreprendre](https://entreprendre.service-public.gouv.fr/vosdroits/F37436).

### Gaps and Limitations
*   **Details of the Collective Procedure**: The provided findings confirm a collective procedure judgment on March 21, 2025, but do not specify the exact nature of the ruling (e.g., whether it resulted in a reorganization/redressement plan or an outright liquidation).
*   **Leadership Discrepancy**: There is a minor discrepancy regarding the first name of the key individual associated with the company (Christine Knockaert on the website vs. Celine Knockaert in corporate mandates) that cannot be definitively resolved with the provided data.
